markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Impromptu Zoom meeting to discuss and demo new features in a workflow tool, addressing user feedback and exploring potential improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New human review step with compare before/after functionality introduced, allowing for efficient content editing and approval](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [SEMrush API integration challenges discussed, highlighting need for improved filtering and control options](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Keyword clustering and gap analysis processes currently manual due to API limitations and large data volumes](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Team agreed to set up a new communication channel for product feedback and updates between companies](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Topics

### New Human Review Step Demo

  - [Introduced compare before/after functionality in human review step](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Allows word-by-word or sentence-by-sentence comparison](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Users can accept/reject individual changes or bulk approve/reject](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Works with various text formats, including HTML and Markdown](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Marcel expressed excitement about potential time savings (1-2 hours → 10-15 minutes) in editing process](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

### SEMrush API Integration Challenges

  - [Current limitations in filtering and control options when using SEMrush API](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Issues with keyword gap analysis between competitors (unreliable results, lack of filtering)](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Need for more robust controls to handle large volumes of keywords (e.g., 55,000+) efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Suggestion to explore SQL query-based approaches for data manipulation](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)

### Keyword Clustering and Analysis Process

  - [Current process involves manual export of CSV files from SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Use of ChatGPT to consolidate data into a single CSV for import](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Creation of "competitive assignments" based on keyword clusters and ranking URLs](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Challenge: Processing large volumes of keywords (e.g., 62,000) to identify relevant opportunities (10-20k)](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Goal: Programmatically find and rank opportunities to present long-term value to clients](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)

### Communication and Feedback

  - [Proposal to create a new Slack channel for product feedback and updates](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Channel to include team members from both companies](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Purpose: Facilitate open communication, share updates, and gather feedback](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up new Slack channel for product feedback and updates between companies](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Explore implementation of new human review step in existing workflows (Sadira and team to lead)](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Investigate potential improvements to SEMrush API integration, focusing on filtering and control options](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Consider SQL query-based approaches for handling large datasets in workflows](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Record and share a Loom video demonstrating final features discussed in the meeting](https://fathom.video/share/RTdz_XzUUpvbuo959LMz_i4cvdoRy_5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
